author: Siliconera
text:
Atlus Already Selling Anime Expo Metaphor: ReFantazio and Persona Merchandise
The Atlus Anime Expo Metaphor: ReFantazio, Persona 3 Reload, Persona 5 Royal, and Persona 30th anniversary merchandise is there.

author: Siliconera
text:
Mario Kart World Update Adds Knockout Tour Routes, Photo Mode Stickers
The latest Mario Kart World patch added two new Knockout Tour routes, Photo Mode stickers support, and balance updates.

author: Siliconera
text:
Persona 5 Royal Makoto Niijima and Morgana Figures Will Be at Anime Expo 2026
The FuRyu Anime Expo 2026 booth will feature the Persona 5 Royal Makoto Niijima and Morgana figures ahead of their debut.

author: Siliconera
text:
Valko Won’t Be at Love and Deepspace Anime Expo 2026 Booth
The Love and Deepspace Anime Expo 2026 booth won't feature Valko and his Interactive Sessions were pulled.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Pochita Chainsaw Man Bread Dog Plush Makes Him a Pure Bread Devil
The two new Pochita Chainsaw Man plush toys reference the bread dog face photo trend and meme and Denji's love of bread.

author: Siliconera
text:
Code Vein 2 DLC Expansion Features Liv Voda and Lou MagMell
The Code Vein 2 DLC Expansion Mask of Idris is on the way and will feature Lou MagMell and Liv Voda as characters.

author: Siliconera
text:
PS3 and Vita PlayStation Store Closing, PS5 Physical Game Copies Ending
PS3 PlayStation Store closures start in August, Vita one will be closing in 2027, and PS5 physical game copies end in 2028.

author: Siliconera
text:
Shueisha Will Stop Selling Its Marvel Manga Series in Japan
Shueisha's contract with Disney Japan will expire at the end of September 2026, and so will all of the related manga releases.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: Rhythm Heaven Groove Stands the Test of Timing
Rhythm Heaven Groove follows the franchise formula very closely, building a familiar but robust toy box for fans of the beat.

author: Siliconera
text:
Summer Aventurine and Robin Honkai: Star Rail Alts Appear
The  Summer Planarcadia alts for Aventurine and Robin in Honkai: Star Rail are Adventurine • Waveflair and Robin • Summeretto.

author: Siliconera
text:
More Inazuma Eleven and Sanrio Merchandise Appears
Reize, Burn, and Gazelle fans have no rights, apparently.

author: Siliconera
text:
Hear the Aimer SAO Echoes of Aincrad Opening Movie Theme Song
The new Sword Art Online Echoes of Aincrad opening movie trailer appeared and includes the Aimer theme song.

author: Siliconera
text:
UGREEN Honkai: Star Rail Yao Guang Merchandise Debuts
The five items in the UGREEN Honkai: Star Rail Yao Guang merchandise collection that includes power banks are now live.
